task_description: Generate a complete 70-page academic course work (kurs ishi) as a single self-contained HTML file with embedded CSS and SVG diagrams. Topic: 'Muzqaymoq do'koni boshqaruv tizimini yaratish' (Creating an ice cream shop management system). For Renessans Ta'lim Universiteti, Information Systems course. Content in Uzbek language, academic style.
